data.description: Investor discloses 8.3% ownership of Picton Property Income Limited.

data.title: Earnings Scheduled For April 10, 2026
data.description: Before the market opens, Lotus Technology (NASDAQ: LOT) is projected to announce a quarterly loss of $0.15 per share with revenues around $137.37 million. Uxin (NASDAQ: UXIN) is also anticipated to disclose its fourth-quarter earnings. Following the market close, FRP Holdings (NASDAQ: FRPH) is estimated to release its report. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Ziba Med Spa Announces First Anniversary Celebration and Spring Wellness Treatment Packages
data.description: Tarzana's top medical aesthetics center is hosting a special Mother's Day brunch event and unveiling a new selection of treatment packages for the season. Based in Los Angeles, this renowned establishment, Ziba Med Spa, offers a range of services to its community.

data.title: Unparalleled Sky‑High Views at Avra Metropolitan Set a New Standard in Naples, Florida Living
data.description: A newly built high-rise condominium community, Avra at Metropolitan Naples, located in Naples, Florida, has been gaining widespread attention for its unparalleled views. Situated in Southwest Florida, the building offers residents distinctive vantage points to witness the stunning scenery of the Gulf and the city of Naples. This development is significantly unique in the region, showcasing scenery that no other building in the area can offer. Residents can enjoy breathtaking views from this striking new structure, making it a standout in the community.

data.title: Whitehawk Therapeutics Presents Real-World Analysis Confirming MUC16 as a Highly Expressed, Clinically Relevant Target for Gynecologic Cancers at SGO 2026
data.description: MUC16 has been identified as the ADC target with the highest expression levels in ovarian cancer, showing at least double the expression compared to other emerging targets. This gene is consistently and significantly expressed in the most aggressive and prevalent subtypes of endometrial cancer. These discoveries bolster Whitehawk's efforts in formulating ADCs that specifically target MUC16.

data.title: Verastem Oncology Announces Two-Year Median Follow-Up Data on AVMAPKI® FAKZYNJA® Combination Therapy (avutometinib capsules; defactinib tablets) in Recurrent Low-Grade Serous Ovarian Cancer at the SGO 2026 Annual Meeting on Women’s Cancers
data.description: Verastem Oncology, a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq under VSTM, shared two-year median follow-up results from the Phase 2 RAMP 201 trial. The study assessed the combination therapy of AVMAPKI® FAKZYNJA® (avutometinib capsules and defactinib tablets) in patients with recurrent low-grade serous ovarian cancer (LGSOC). These findings will be presented at the Society's oral plenary session today.

data.title: Upbound Group, Inc. Announces Timing of First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Plano, Texas - Upbound Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPBD), a company specializing in inclusive financial solutions for underserved consumers, will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on April 30, 2026. The report will be issued before the market opens, with a conference call scheduled for 9:00 a.m. ET on the same day to review the results. Those interested can join the call to participate in the discussion.

data.title: Aethir stops bridge exploit, vows to compensate for near $90K loss after PeckShield estimates $400K in damages.
data.description: Aethir successfully prevented a bridge exploit on its Ethereum-linked contracts, managing to curtail potential losses to less than $90,000. This action was taken after PeckShield estimated that the exploit could have resulted in damages of around $400,000.

data.title: Mainstreet Equity Corp. Announces Quarterly Dividend for Period Ending March 31, 2026
data.description: CALGARY, Alberta--Mainstreet Equity Corp. (TSX: MEQ) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.08 per Common Share for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. The dividend will be paid on April 30, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 17, 2026. The entire amount of the dividend is designated as an “eligible dividend” for tax purposes.

data.title: Monport Advanced Fiber Laser and CO2 Laser Machines Boost Custom Engraving and Seasonal Production In 2026
data.description: On April 10, 2026, Monport Laser announced the expansion of its product offerings for the year, with a focus on fiber laser and CO2 laser engraving and cutting machines. These new machines are targeted towards manufacturers and custom production businesses that require increased speed and precision in their fabrication processes. The expanded portfolio includes a variety of models to cater to different needs and preferences in the industry. This move signifies Monport Laser's commitment to meeting the growing demand for advanced laser technology in manufacturing and custom production.

data.title: NexGold Intersects 1.79 g/t Gold Over 25.6 Metres at the Goldlund Deposit, Ontario
data.description: NexGold Mining Corp. has shared new findings from its ongoing diamond drilling program at the Goliath Gold Complex in Toronto on April 10, 2026. The program, with a total of 25,000 meters, is mainly targeting the Goldlund Deposit to enhance open pit Mineral Resources. The recent results cover 777 meters of diamond drilling across three holes (GL-25-015, GL-25-016, and GL-26-009) focused on expanding mineralization in Zone 4 of the Goldlund Deposit within Inferred Resources at the northeast end of the open pit Mineral Resource. The Company's news release from January 28, 2026, provides more details on the Goliath Gold Complex, which includes the Goliath, Goldlund, and Miller Deposits. NexGold is listed as TSXV: NEXG and OTCQX: NXGCF.

data.title: Elcora Receives Final TSXV Clearance of Subscriber PIF and Confirms New Reporting Insider Status
data.description: This press release is targeted for distribution solely within Canada and is not meant for distribution to United States newswire services or for dissemination in the United States.

data.title: JD.com Announces Completion of CNY10 Billion Offering of CNY-denominated Senior Notes
data.description: On April 10, 2026, JD.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: JD, HKEX: 9618 (HKD), 89618 (RMB)), a top supply chain-based tech and service provider, finalized the issuance of CNY10 billion in senior unsecured notes (the “Notes”). These Notes were offered outside the U.S. to non-U.S. persons, adhering to Regulation S under the U.S. Securities Act of 1933.

data.title: Aura Announces Preliminary Q1 2026 Production Results, another record high and on track with the Company Guidance
data.description: Aura Minerals Inc. announced its Q1 2026 preliminary production results from its six operating mines in Road Town, British Virgin Islands. The total production for the quarter reached 82,137 gold equivalent ounces (GEO) at current prices, marking a record high and a 37% increase from Q1 2025. At constant prices, the quarterly production increased by 1% from Q4 2025 and 41% from Q1 2025. The company also reported selling 81,364 GEO during the quarter, a slight increase compared to the previous quarter. Aura Minerals Inc. is listed on NASDAQ as AUGO and B3 as AURA33 and remains on track with its production guidance.

data.title: Concorde International Group Ltd. Announces Ticker Change to "YOOV" Following Acquisition of YOOV Group Holding Limited
data.description: Concorde International Group Ltd. has revealed that it will be changing its ticker symbol to "YOOV" as a result of its recent acquisition of YOOV Group Holding Limited. This move signifies an important development for the company, with the new ticker becoming effective immediately. Investors will now identify the company through the symbol "YOOV," reflecting its strengthened position in the market following the acquisition. This alteration marks a pivotal moment for Concorde International Group Ltd. as it continues to evolve and expand its operations.

data.title: Barrick to Report First Quarter 2026 Results on May 11
data.description: The Barrick Mining Corporation, listed as (NYSE:B)(TSX:ABX), is set to announce its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on May 11, 2026, at 6:00 AM ET. A live webcast and presentation by the management team will take place at 11:00 AM ET on the same day, with a subsequent session for analysts to ask questions. This release marks an important update for investors following Barrick's recent activities in the market.
